cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. The question is asking what Lao Yang hoped for regarding his article. The options are A, B, C, D. First, let me recap the story. Lao Yang is someone who loved reading and wanted to be a writer as a young man. He used to send stories to editorial departments but didn't get any responses. Now he works in a factory, still reads when he can, and hasn't given up on his dream of being a writer. His daughter, Xiao Ping, was assigned to write an article titled "My Father," but she was struggling. Lao Yang helped her by writing the article himself.
